message:
Add more Node.js module polyfills for claude --version

- Add Web Streams API: ReadableStream, WritableStream, TransformStream
- Add net module with Socket class
- Add tls module with TLSSocket class
- Add http.Agent class for connection pooling
- Add constants module (fs/os constants)
- Add domain module (deprecated but needed)
- Fix stream module to export Stream class as default
- Add node: prefixed aliases for all modules

Progress: CLI now gets past module loading, still iterating on polyfills
